title: MCP tools for project registration and management
purpose: Provides tools to list, register, and unregister projects with validation for absolute paths and filesystem existence.
module_context: Exports schemas and handlers for three project management tools: list_projects, register_project, and unregister_project. Uses projectRegistry service for all operations.

steps.content: Retrieve the complete list of registered projects from the project registry.
Return the list of projects in a structured response object.

methods.name: handleRegisterProject
methods.normalized_params: (args: { path: string }): Promise<{ success: boolean; project?: Project; error?: string }>

steps.content: Validate that the provided path is absolute.
IF the path is not absolute, return a failure response with an error message.
Register the project path with the project registry.
Retrieve the updated list of projects from the registry.
Find and return the registered project that matches the provided path.
IF registration fails, catch the error and return a failure response with the error message.
Attempt to remove the specified project path from the project registry.
Return a success status indicating whether the project was successfully removed.
